india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Share Prices Highlights: Indian shares rose on Thursday, supported by steady earnings ​and signs of progress in U.S.-China trade relations, though sentiment ‌remained fragile as elevated oil prices and foreign ​outflows drove the rupee to another record ⁠low.

india_trends.title: JSW Steel Q4 Results: Cons profit surges 131% YoY to Rs 3,475 crore, revenue rises 14%
india_trends.summary: JSW Steel reported a significant 11-fold surge in consolidated net profit for the March quarter, reaching Rs 16,370 crore. This impressive growth was accompanied by a 14% year-on-year increase in revenue from operations, which stood at Rs 51,180 crore for Q4FY26.

india_trends.title: JSW Steel posts two-fold rise in Q4 profit as steel prices recover
india_trends.summary: JSW Steel has announced a significant profit increase. The company's profit before tax more than doubled in the quarter ending March 31. india_trends.title: HUDCO Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 172% to ₹1,981 crore, NII up 16.5%; ₹1.5 dividend announced
india_trends.summary: HUDCO reported a significant increase in consolidated net profit for the March quarter, reaching ₹1,981 crore, a 172% rise from ₹723 crore last year, largely attributed to a deferred tax credit of ₹1,530.32 crore.
